title: sambucus racemosa pubens
intro: Sambucus racemosa pubens, also known as the American red-berried elder, is a shrub or small tree in the family Adoxaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Sambucus racemosa pubens include relief from cold and flu symptoms, reduced inflammation, and improved immune function. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are often used to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections.
